prompt: Create a bold and colorful vertical infographic for Instagram Stories (9:16 aspect ratio) showing the 5 stages of product development. Use a vibrant gradient background (deep purple to electric blue). Display 5 sequential stages as large numbered cards stacked vertically, each card a distinct bright color: Stage 1 - DISCOVERY (coral/orange card, magnifying glass icon, subtitle: 'Research & Ideation'), Stage 2 - DESIGN (pink/magenta card, pen tool icon, subtitle: 'Wireframes & Prototypes'), Stage 3 - DEVELOPMENT (cyan/teal card, code bracket icon, subtitle: 'Build & Iterate'), Stage 4 - TESTING (lime green card, checkmark shield icon, subtitle: 'QA & Validation'), Stage 5 - LAUNCH (gold/yellow card, rocket icon, subtitle: 'Release & Growth'). Each card has a bold large number on the left, the stage name in thick uppercase sans-serif font, a simple flat icon, and a short subtitle. Cards are connected by downward arrows. Title at top reads 'PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT STAGES' in large white bold text. Clean modern flat design, high contrast, readable at mobile size, professional yet energetic aesthetic.
